meaning: n.竞争,竞赛,敌对,敌对状态
examples: It was Allen who fired this rivalry with real passion.
There is more to the rivalry between rail and air than the experience in transit.
Their distance may be temporary, but it shows that childhood rivalry isn't always outgrown.
Strachan and McLeish still remain friends, despite the intense rivalry between the two Glasgow clubs.
Their rivalry is not only being played out on the road but also on Twitter.
